story_title: Implement database schema for media support

questions.question: Does the migration execute successfully without errors?
questions.actionable_check: Run migration via Knex CLI or programmatically, verify no exceptions thrown
questions.pass_criteria: Migration completes with exit code 0, no errors logged

questions.question: Does media_blobs table have all required columns with correct types?
questions.actionable_check: Query database schema for media_blobs table, verify all 8 columns present (hash, mime_type, size_bytes, dimensions_json, blurhash, local_path, uploaded_at, created_at) with correct types
questions.pass_criteria: All 8 columns present, hash is PRIMARY KEY, types match specification

questions.question: Does message_media table have correct semantic foreign keys and index?
questions.actionable_check: Query schema for message_media table, verify message_id and blob_hash columns exist to reference nostr_messages.id and media_blobs.hash semantically, verify index on upload_status exists
evidence_required: column definitions for message_id and blob_hash
questions.pass_criteria: message_id and blob_hash columns present (semantic FK references), idx_message_media_upload_status index exists. Note: Project uses application-level referential integrity, not database-enforced FK constraints

questions.question: Does nostr_messages table have media_json column?
questions.actionable_check: Query nostr_messages schema, verify media_json column exists with TEXT type
questions.pass_criteria: media_json column present, type is TEXT

questions.question: Does the migration rollback (down) execute successfully?
questions.actionable_check: Run migration rollback, verify tables and column are removed without errors
questions.pass_criteria: Rollback completes successfully, media_blobs and message_media tables removed, media_json column removed

questions.question: Does the migration follow project conventions?
questions.actionable_check: Compare migration file structure, naming, and patterns to existing migrations (e.g., 20251221100000_create_relay_sync_state.ts). Verify NO database-enforced FK constraints (project pattern: application-level referential integrity only)
questions.pass_criteria: Follows timestamp naming, uses Knex types correctly, matches existing migration patterns including no DB-enforced FK constraints (verified: connection.ts does not enable PRAGMA foreign_keys)

questions.question: Is referential integrity handled appropriately per project pattern?
questions.actionable_check: Verify migration follows project pattern of NO database-enforced FK constraints. Application code will handle cascade deletes when needed (e.g., deleting a message should clean up message_media entries)
evidence_required: migration code shows no .foreign() or .onDelete() calls
questions.pass_criteria: Migration correctly omits DB-enforced FK constraints, consistent with project pattern (connection.ts does not enable PRAGMA foreign_keys). Application-level referential integrity will be handled by future data access layers

questions.question: Can data be inserted into and queried from the new tables?
questions.actionable_check: After migration, insert test record into media_blobs, insert test record into message_media with valid FK references, query back successfully
questions.pass_criteria: Test data can be inserted and retrieved without constraint violations

mandatory_questions.question: Is there any dead code introduced by this story?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Search for unused functions, classes, imports in migration file
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No unused code in story scope (migration file only has up/down functions)

mandatory_questions.question: Are there any duplicate implementations?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check for similar migration logic in other migration files
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No duplicate implementations - this is the only media schema migration

mandatory_questions.question: Do integration tests validate the migration workflow?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Verify integration test exists that runs migration, verifies schema, and tests rollback
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: At least one integration test covers migration up and down successfully
